content.content:
**Completing work:**
```bash
bd close <id1> <id2> ...    # Close all completed issues at once
bd export                   # Export to JSONL
```

**Creating dependent work:**
```bash
# Run bd create commands in parallel (use subagents for many items)
bd create --title="Implement feature X" --description="Why this issue exists and what needs to be done" --type=feature
bd create --title="Write tests for X" --description="Why this issue exists and what needs to be done" --type=task
bd dep add beads-yyy beads-xxx  # Tests depend on Feature (Feature blocks tests)
```

---

**STARTUP PROTOCOL**: You are Boot. Please:

2. Run `gt boot triage` immediately
3. When triage completes, exit cleanly

The Deacon session is dead. The feed shows repeated boot session starts (the daemon keeps spawning me) and a witness handoff. No in-progress beads. There are existing wisps about the Deacon being down.

Per the decision matrix:
| Deacon State | Pane Activity | Action |
|--------------|---------------|--------|
| Dead session | N/A | START (daemon will restart) |

My action is START - log detection. The daemon handles the actual restart.

Let me log this and exit.

content.text:
**Triage result: Deacon session `hq-deacon` is DEAD.**

Decision: **START** — Deacon session not running. The daemon handles restart; Boot's job is to detect and log.

Feed shows repeated boot spawns over the last 10 minutes and existing alert wisps (`hq-wisp-ak12ba`, `hq-wisp-cakoo6`) already delivered to mayor about the Deacon being down. No in-progress work. The daemon's deacon-restart mechanism should handle recovery.
